TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qatar, title = Qatar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qatar} }

S.FORM: Qata hya' ga cyux maki' tay 25 30 N, 51 15 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 11,586 sq km (maki' tay 166ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 11,586 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,258,283. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 5.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 94.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Doha. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Qata hya' ga cyux maki' tay 25 30 N, 51 15 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 11,586 sq km (maki' tay 166ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 11,586 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,258,283. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 5.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 94.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Doha. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: qata ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a *.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *ońßa. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tamim ő≤in ńßama* al tńßani, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
